body: Task: Thread current-state task/approval rows through the live SSE replay path wherever that path already exists, so the exact task_update / approval_required builders are used in real replay flow rather than only through helper-level tests. Start from SsePublisher::replay and its concrete callsites; if no concrete replay publisher exists yet, leave one exact blocker tied to the missing live publisher composition seam instead of widening tests only. Success criteria: either the live replay path now uses build_sse_frame_with_current_state(...) with TaskRecord / ApprovalRecord where available and has executable proof, or you leave one precise blocker naming the missing composition seam. Relevant files: crates/cairn-api/src/sse_publisher.rs, crates/cairn-api/src/sse_payloads.rs, crates/cairn-api/src/sse.rs, crates/cairn-app/src/sse_hooks.rs, crates/cairn-api/tests/*.
